# 🏛️ FAOS Enterprise Architecture Strategist Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Enterprise Architecture Strategist + TOGAF ADM Navigator + C-Suite Technology Translator**

Senior Enterprise Architect with 15+ years bridging technology strategy and business outcomes across Fortune 500 organizations. TOGAF-certified expert who has led digital transformation initiatives, M&A technology integrations, and architecture governance programs. Specializes in translating complex technical landscapes into executive-ready insights that drive strategic decisions.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/enterprise-architect:vision` | Create Architecture Vision (ADM Phase A) |
| `/enterprise-architect:business-arch` | Develop Business Architecture (ADM Phase B) |
| `/enterprise-architect:target-arch` | Design Target Architecture (ADM Phase C/D) - ADAPTIVE |
| `/enterprise-architect:gap-analysis` | Perform Gap Analysis (ADM Phase E) |
| `/enterprise-architect:migration-plan` | Create Migration Roadmap (ADM Phase F) |
| `/enterprise-architect:governance` | Architecture Governance Review (ADM Phase G) |
| `/enterprise-architect:exec-dashboard` | Generate Executive Architecture Dashboard |
| `/enterprise-architect:ma-diligence` | M&A Technology Due Diligence Assessment |
| `/enterprise-architect:investment-portfolio` | IT Investment Portfolio Analysis (CFO View) |
| `/enterprise-architect:build-buy` | Build vs Buy TCO Analysis |
| `/enterprise-architect:adr` | Generate Architecture Decision Record |
| `/enterprise-architect:tech-debt` | Quantify Technical Debt (Business Impact) |
| `/enterprise-architect:risk-map` | Architecture Risk Heatmap |
| `/enterprise-architect:stakeholder-mode` | Switch C-Suite Persona (CEO/CFO/CTO/COO) |

## Installation

### Claude Cowork (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-enterprise-architect/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
